error_signature: execution data persists despite save settings
title: Execution data persists in queue mode despite settings
symptom: Execution data is written to the database even when the settings to disable it are applied. The data remains in the execution_data table after workflow completion.

error_signature: workflow fails to resume safely after partial execution
title: Workflow fails to resume after failure
symptom: When a workflow processing large datasets fails, it restarts from the beginning, causing duplicates and skipped records.

title: n8n credentials unavailable in manual execution mode
symptom: When manually executing an n8n workflow, nodes that require OAuth credentials fail with 'credentials not available' or 'OAuth credentials unavailable'.

error_signature: workflow executes old version instead of updated nodes
title: Webhook triggers old workflow version
symptom: The webhook from Airtable executes the workflow, but the downstream nodes do not reflect the latest updates made in the editor.

title: OpenAI Embedding Node truncates vectors to 192 dimensions
symptom: The OpenAI Embedding Node returns vectors in 192 dimensions instead of the expected 768 dimensions. This occurs despite the embedding models returning the correct dimensions when tested directly.

title: Undefined fields when using .item after a branch
symptom: Fields show as undefined when using .item in expressions after a branch/merge, even though data exists in previous nodes.

title: Execution terminated due to tool description length
symptom: The workflow returns a 'terminated' error when using the Embeddings Ollama node connected to Qdrant. The AI Agent node does not call the LLM, and there are no relevant logs indicating a crash.

title: Wait node gets stuck due to invalid token error
symptom: The wait node in the workflow becomes unresponsive, and the error 'INVALID TOKEN' is displayed when a webhook call fails.

title: Tumblr OAuth 2.0 requires refresh token
symptom: After the initial connection with Tumblr OAuth 2.0, subsequent attempts fail with a 'refreshToken is required' error.

title: Expression returns [undefined] instead of value
symptom: When trying to access a value from a previous node using an expression, the output is [undefined]. This occurs intermittently, causing confusion.

title: n8n workflow created but not activated
symptom: Webhook or schedule trigger does not fire. Workflow exists but does not respond to incoming events.

error_signature: master workflow does not trigger on sub-workflow error
title: Master workflow fails to trigger on sub-workflow errors
symptom: When an error occurs in a sub-workflow, the master workflow's error handling does not activate, leading to unhandled errors.

error_signature: [400 Bad Request] This model only supports Interactions API
title: Google Gemini model only supports Interactions API
symptom: When using the Google Gemini Chat Model node with the deep-research-max-preview-04-2026 model, a 400 Bad Request error occurs indicating that the model only supports the Interactions API.

error_signature: task request was timed out after 60 seconds
title: Code Node task request timeout
symptom: The Code Node fails to execute and returns a timeout error after 60 seconds. This prevents the workflow from completing successfully.

error_signature: unreadable characters when converting binary to text
title: Binary data conversion results in unreadable characters
symptom: The workflow attempts to convert binary data to text, resulting in unreadable characters. The output shows that the text extraction method is not yielding readable text.

error_signature: No binary data with field data1,data2 found
title: No binary data found in output
symptom: The workflow fails to produce the expected binary data for download, resulting in an error message stating 'No binary data with field data1,data2 found'.

title: Unable to read/write files in n8n on Docker
symptom: When attempting to read/write files in n8n running on Docker, the error 'No file(s) found' occurs.

title: OpenAI credential test error despite valid API key
symptom: Users encounter a 'credential test error' when trying to connect OpenAI credentials, even though the API key is valid. This error may cause confusion as workflows can still execute successfully.

title: Model thinking included in response from Ollama
symptom: After updating to n8n 1.123.5 and ollama 0.13.2, the output includes model thinking without a separator, making it difficult to parse.

title: n8n node expression syntax error
symptom: A node fails with 'Invalid expression' or 'Expression evaluation error' when referencing data from previous nodes.

title: Duplicate records due to webhook retries
symptom: When the same webhook event is received multiple times, duplicate records are created in the database. This leads to unintended duplicate actions downstream.

title: Google Sheets node returns Error 400: invalid_request
symptom: When attempting to authenticate the Google Sheets node, n8n throws 'Error 400: invalid_request'. This occurs due to a missing 'https://' in the redirect URI.

title: n8n fails to boot after migrating SQLite database
symptom: After migrating the SQLite database to a Docker environment, n8n fails to start properly, often due to permission issues.

title: Statistics show 0 production executions
symptom: The n8n dashboard displays 0 production executions despite workflows running successfully. This discrepancy occurs after a recent update.

title: OpenAI node reports 'File not found'
symptom: The OpenAI node fails to process the file and returns 'File not found'. This occurs when the webhook node has no binary data attached.
